auth.signOutAria: Sign out of Clinical Insight workspace
auth.sessionExpiringDesc: You have been inactive. For your security, you will be logged out in 1 minute if inactivity continues.
auth.connectionErrorDesc: Unable to verify your session. Please check your connection and try again.

landing.heroSubtitle: Empower clinicians and patients with real-time risk analysis, personalized insights, and actionable prevention plans.
landing.featureRealTimeDesc: Get instant diabetes risk scores powered by clinical-grade machine learning models trained on diverse patient populations.
landing.featurePersonalizedDesc: Each assessment delivers tailored advice for both clinicians and patients, with actionable recommendations and clear explanations.
landing.featureSecureDesc: Your data stays secure with enterprise-grade encryption. Simulated 2FA and session management keep patient information protected.
landing.workflowStep1Desc: Fill in key health metrics like HbA1c, BMI, blood glucose, and lifestyle factors.
landing.workflowStep2Desc: Our ML model analyzes the data and provides a risk score with detailed factor breakdown.
landing.workflowStep3Desc: Access personalized clinician and patient advice, export reports, and track changes over time.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join healthcare providers using Clinical Insight to deliver proactive, data-driven diabetes prevention.
landing.faq1Q: How accurate is the risk assessment?
landing.faq1A: Our model uses logistic regression trained on CDC diabetes data with high accuracy. Results should always be reviewed by a qualified healthcare professional for clinical decision-making.
landing.faq2A: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use simulated 2FA, session timeouts, and never share your data with third parties.
landing.faq3A: Yes, you can export individual assessments as PDF reports and bulk data as CSV for further analysis in your preferred tools.
landing.footerCopyright: © 2026 Clinical Insight Engine. All rights reserved.

assessment.title: New Assessment
assessment.disclaimer: This assessment is for informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical advice.

history.title: Patient History
history.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.

import.title: Bulk Import CSV
import.instructions: Upload a CSV file with patient data to perform batch assessments.
import.dropZone: Drop your CSV file here or click to browse

notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist.

low.clinician: Monitor annually. No immediate intervention required.
low.patient: Keep up the good work! Continue your healthy lifestyle and routine checkups.

moderate.clinician: Recommend lifestyle counseling. Repeat HbA1c in 6 months.
moderate.patient: Consider increasing physical activity and managing your diet to lower your risk.

high.clinician: High risk detected. Refer for diagnostic testing and consider intervention.
high.patient: Please consult your doctor soon to discuss a detailed prevention plan.

hba1c.clinician: Review glycemic control and consider initiating or adjusting therapy.
hba1c.patient: Focus on managing your blood sugar through diet and prescribed medications.

glucose.clinician: Immediate follow-up on elevated glucose levels may be necessary.
glucose.patient: Monitor your daily glucose readings closely and follow your meal plan.

bmi.clinician: Discuss weight management strategies and nutritional counseling.
bmi.patient: Work on achieving a healthier weight through balanced nutrition and regular exercise.

hypertension.clinician: Optimize blood pressure management and monitor for complications.
hypertension.patient: Regularly check your blood pressure and reduce salt intake.

smoking.clinician: Provide smoking cessation resources and support.
smoking.patient: Quitting smoking is one of the most effective ways to reduce your diabetes risk.

heartDisease.clinician: Coordinate care with cardiology and manage cardiovascular risk factors.
heartDisease.patient: Manage your heart health as it is closely linked to diabetes risk.

age.clinician: Consider age-related metabolic changes in the management plan.
age.patient: As you get older, it's more important to stay active and monitor your health.
